title: Cardiac Surgery for Mariam Haddad — Beirut
story: I am Mariam Haddad, a 46-year-old teacher from Beirut. After months of worsening symptoms I was diagnosed with severe mitral valve stenosis and my cardiologist at the American University of Beirut Medical Center has scheduled urgent valve-replacement surgery for August 2026. With the currency collapse my family's savings no longer cover the operation and post-operative care. This fund goes directly to AUBMC for the procedure and recovery.
